review_title: Excellent customer service, frequent and useful updates, easy to use.
description: Helped with policies, procedures, and monitoring. Helped get thru many exams.
author: Jason C.
pros: Ease of use is a big factor. The software upgrades have been very useful. And with each upgrade, they issue detailed instructions on how the upgrade works and what steps to implement the upgrade. I also greatly appreciate the webinars. They are very responsive to the users.
cons: Not really much that I can think of. We use all modules in the software. I have even had examiners brag on the software, which never happens.

review_title: Tandem Review
description: We’ve used Tandem for the last 3+ years and it has simplified our processes and allowed us to be more effective in managing our programs.
author: Beth F.
pros: The software is easy to use, makes managing components of Info security way and reports for auditors and board are effective.
cons: There are some reporting feature enhancements that would be helpful, but I appreciate that Tandem welcomes enhancement recommendations.

review_title: Software from a bank we acquired
description: Very little compared to the main software we use. It is cheaper in grand scheme things but not what a large bank would need for Vendor Management.
author: Craig R.
pros: The ease of use, and the unlimited amount of entries into the respository that an user can upload into their database. Cost also
cons: Very limited on reporting as well as not a thorough Risk Analysis dynamic To mean, just an online document holding bin.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Necessary tools for information security compliance at an affordable price
description: I've been using various modules of the software for many years and am pleased with the depth and capabilities of the product. Examiner and auditors have also been pleased with the output.
author: Bryan B.
pros: The tool is completely web based and accessible from anywhere.
cons: Some of the modules such as Risk Assessments can get pretty complex making them time consuming to setup and review.

review_title: Tandem has moved our organization forward.
author: Joey R.
pros: The Tandem product modules are powerful without being overengineered. The modules share a common database where policies are linked to vendors, information assets, risk assessments, incidents, and audits. The ease-of-use has empowered more people in more departments to participate in vendor management, contract reviews, risk assessments, and continuity planning.
cons: I don't have any complaints about the Tandem products. I'll be the first to purchase a change management module if/when they build it into their ecosystem.

review_title: The need for Tandem
description: We have been using the Tandem products for over twelve years and have come to depend on it to provide the information we need for examinations. Any questions or concerns are answered immediately and the people are always friendly and willing to help. We don't have to worry about knowing if our information is addressing any of the new regulatory guidelines because Tandem stays on top of the releases and applies them to the program.
author: Kerry R.
pros: The feature I like most about Tandem is the ease of use and versatility followed close by the fact that you don't have to worry about whether your documents are up-to-date with the latest regulatory releases.
cons: Because Tandem incorporates so many aspects of the organization it requires quite a bit of time to initially enter the information into the program and to maintain the information as your organization changes.

review_title: Tandem is a great value for features delivered.
description: Great company to have as a partner.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Tandem is kept current with changing regs and best practices. The support team is responsive and pays attention to customer suggestions, often integrating them in to future versions. The integration across modules is a big time saver and keeps resulting reports coordinated across the system.
cons: As an early user of the system, there were a few things that would have made initial setup easier. I made suggestions and all were added into future versions.

review_title: This is my second experience with Tandem software. Tandem has come a long way. I love it.
description: Reduced time to manage audits and track mitigation tasks. One virtual location to store documentation such as audit, risk and compliance docs.
author: Don B.
pros: The return on investment is high. It saves time and provides a central location to store our documentation for management and audit review. The dashboards provide information for the Board and various committees on status of our audit, risk and compliance efforts.
cons: I can't say I dislike anything, however I can see where several additional apps would be nice. An Incident handling app that interfaces with the BCP app would be nice.

review_title: Great Cybesecurity tool
description: It has been a great experience
author: Lino O.
pros: Like how the data integrate with their other module allowing the user to do less clicking
cons: No cons at the moment because they do appreciate feedback from their customers.

review_title: Great product, its been critical in our GLBA compliance efforts
author: Jared M.
pros: Flexibility. Can be used with little effort for beginners, but also allows for full customization for advanced program administrators.
cons: Just a couple places where some additional logic would make sense. For example, having to manually remove a control when I've told the system in a questionnaire that I don't have that control.

review_title: Tandem nos dio la dirección que necesitábamos
author: Juanito O.
pros: Nos ha ayudado a llenar los vacíos con respecto a nuestra seguridad y las evaluaciones de riesgo. Fue de gran ayuda para nuestros procesos de comercio en línea. Facilitó también la presentación de informes a nuestro directorio.
cons: Al principio su uso no fue muy sencillo, pero creo que su curva de aprendizaje es el que se podría esperar de un software de su tipo.

review_title: Tandem Review
author: Jason S.
pros: Vendor Management Audit Policies Incident Response
cons: Employee management to track systems accesses so that when an employee leaves it is easier to ensure all accesses have been removed.

review_title: Tandem is a great value and covers all the bases if you educate yourself on the software.
author: Derek S.
pros: Very thoughrough coverage of what most regulators are looking for at a reasonable cost. Customer support actually listens to (and implements) suggestions and constructive criticism of the software.
cons: Sometimes it can be difficult to find the exact section of information you are looking for if you don't use it often. That may not be the fault of the software, but of the overlapping nature of different types of data and regulations.

review_title: Tandem review
author: Gabrielle C.
pros: Tandem is super easy to use and have a very responsive support team. I love that we can suggest new features.
cons: I think the reporting feature could be improved, just on how many report would could pull or create our own reports

review_title: Generally Tandem offers all of the services I am looking for in the various aspects of security.
description: Really keeps the business organized where all employees can easily find information in one centralized location.
author: Carmen T.
pros: The ease of use and availability of materials no matter of where I am physically located. For Disaster Recovery and BCP, its very important to have quick and easy access to all information.
cons: Some of the areas could improve the depth of the material. The Phishing module is one area where improvement is needed. It works decent, but could be enhanced for scenarios to be more real world.

review_title: Exceptional and easy to use Information Security platform that is delivered at an affordable price
author: Wes G.
pros: I like the integration between the modules that provides you with a comprehensive snapshot of what the examiners are concerned about the most.
cons: They desperately need an onboarding component into vendor management platform. Onboarding component would allow you to evaluate various vendors for purchase, and then route for management approval before being added as a "company vendor" to vendor management module.

review_title: Excellent
description: Very easy to manage and see what is left outstanding, what each person is responsible for
author: Stephanie B.
pros: Automation and ease of use. Customizable and the reports are very useful.
cons: Drag and drop option for loading documents into Tandem without individually opening each request item would be helpful.

review_title: Tandem software and CoNetrix staff are both amazing!
author: Kathy L.
pros: The software is very comprehensive and modules are interfaced as a cross reference. In addition our auditors and regulators love it!
cons: Not one thing ... this is one of the best software investments I have made. Our board is always very impressed with the reports and information we can provide to them.

review_title: Small bank
author: Joe R.
pros: This software provided our bank the ability to handle this process and pass our regulatory exams.
cons: It takes time to understand the logic pattern…may not always be easy for “non tech” employees.

review_title: Great software for community banks
author: Tim M.
pros: This software is questionnaire driven. This makes it easy for users to enter data.
cons: Sometimes it is harder to understand the “why” for the “what”.

review_title: The pillar of my CMS
description: We started with compliance and have bought every applicable module since then. Very solid foundation for us.
author: Dana P.
pros: I was using this product's free version more than 10 years ago, and the paid version is even better and such a value. I like that I can establish the framework of my CMS in a manner that allows me to demonstrate what we "do" before any regulatory changes come our way.
cons: The policy management module is created for IT - wish it would encompass more functionality so we could manage all of our policies.

review_title: The whole package
description: The knowledge and customer support are excellent. The ease of use of the product and the reporting are phenomenal.
author: Katie L.
pros: The ease of use, product offerings and customer support and knowledge.
cons: So many options available. From BCP to Risk Analysis

review_title: Tandem is simply the Best of Breed Information Security Risk management software.
author: Jeff S.
pros: We utilize most of the Tandem software modules. All modules are very feature rich, yet very similar user interface makes learning new features or modules seamless. Very active user community with most new feature requested implemented for all to utilize. Support is nothing less than EXCEPTIONAL. The rare cases i have needed support, they are always quick to respond, very thorough and quick to resolution. Although i have only been to two KEYS conferences (as of yet), they are very beneficial and always learn new ways to utilize the software. Our CRM's have always been great as well. They check in regularly to make sure all is going good and anything needed. I would recommend CoNetrix to anyone looking for Enterprise class Risk Management platform.
cons: The only modules that did not fit our needs was the initial Phishing and Training modules. They are well developed products, but we felt they needed some time to mature. We will revisit them again in the future.

review_title: Exceptional Product and Customer Service
description: We use many of the modules such as BCP, Vendor Management and Risk Assessment. It’s so great t be able to connect the three piece.
author: Denise L.
pros: The modules are easy to use and intuitive. The knowledge base is great and the customer service is fantastic. Many of the suggestions for enhancements by client get implemented which makes you realize the vendor is listening to their clients.
cons: Nothing specific comes to mind. Enhancements were made that fixed the issues I had.

review_title: Great product
description: If you take the time to watch the training videos it’s great!
author: Tina B.
pros: All we need for our Information Security Program in one product
cons: If there was a feature to download all modules into the annual report to the board.
